products.name: Irregular Backlit LED Mirror
products.shortDescription: Oval backlit smart bathroom mirror with touch control & digital display creates nice ambient lighting
products.fullDescription:
This unique capsule-shaped backlit LED bathroom mirror blends minimalist aesthetics and practical smart functions.
1. Factory Customization Available: As direct manufacturer, we tailor the mirror’s outline, overall size, light color temperature (3000K~6500K), and optional features including touch control, time&temperature digital display, anti-fog pad, Bluetooth speaker as your requests.
2. Premium HD Mirror Glass: Made of high-quality silver mirror float glass, the surface presents sharp, undistorted reflection, never blurs under humid bathroom environment.
3. Durable LED Backlight: Soft surrounding backlight delivers even non-glare illumination, ideal for makeup and daily grooming; LED strips have stable performance with low power consumption.
4. Thoughtful After-sales Policy: Complete after-sale system, all electronic components (driver, touch sensor, LED lights) are covered under 2-year warranty.
5. Exclusive Bulk Order Support: For large-quantity cooperation, we provide complimentary professional shooting & optimized promotional pictures to help your store marketing and product listing.

specs.value: CE, ROHS, IP44, UL, SAA, CB
Both normal packaging and mailing packaging available

products.name: Copper Free Silver Mirror
products.shortDescription: This irregular oval backlit LED bathroom mirror with soft ambient lighting features HD clear mirror surface and customizable sizes & functions from our factory.
products.fullDescription:
This organic oval backlit LED bathroom mirror boasts minimalist curved outline and soft surrounding LED glow to elevate bathroom decor.

1. Factory Custom Service: As direct manufacturer, we customize mirror shape, dimension, light CCT(3000K-6500K), optional functions including touch control, anti-fog, temperature & time display, Bluetooth speaker as your demands.

2. High-definition Mirror Glass: Premium silver mirror material ensures distortion-free, crystal-clear reflection, resisting blurring in damp bathroom environment.

3. Premium LED Backlight: Even wrap-around back lighting offers shadow-free illumination ideal for daily makeup and grooming, energy-saving and long lifespan LED strips.

4. Reliable After-sales: All electrical fittings enjoy 2-year warranty with full after-sale support.

5. Bulk Order Perk: Free professional commercial promotional photos are supplied for large-quantity purchases to assist your sales listing.

specs.value: 2 years warranty for the electronic parts
Both normal packaging and mailing packaging available

products.name: Modern Decorative LED Mirror
products.shortDescription: This irregular organic-shaped backlit LED bathroom mirror with touch buttons delivers soft ambient lighting, available for customized size and functions from our factory.
products.fullDescription:
Organic Irregular Backlit LED Bathroom Mirror

  1. Light Configuration

    Equipped with high CRI＞90 LED light strips, adjustable color temperature from 3000K(warm white) to 6500K(cool white), three-color dimmable optional; uniform backside surrounding lighting, low power consumption, long service life up to 50000 hours, no glare for facial makeup.

  2. Mirror Glass Parameter

    5mm thick high-quality float silver mirror, copper-free environmental silver coating, moisture-proof & anti-corrosion, clear undistorted reflection, effectively avoid blurring in humid bathroom.

  3. Intelligent Control & Optional Functions

    Standard touch button control for light on/off; customizable extra functions: defogger pad, time & temperature digital display, Bluetooth speaker, USB charging port as your need. Input voltage supports 110V/220V to fit different country standards.

  4. Customization Service(Factory Direct Supply)

    We are professional manufacturer, freely customize unique irregular outlines, arbitrary length & width dimensions, frame options and function combination according to customer drawings or designs.

  5. After-sales & Bulk Order Benefit

    All electronic accessories (LED driver, touch sensor, lamp strip) enjoy 2-year global warranty. For bulk wholesale clients, we provide free professional shooting & high-definition promotional pictures to support your online store sales.

products.name: Irregular Smart Silver Mirror
products.shortDescription: Irregular LED backlit silver bathroom mirror with touch control, dimmable light, and anti-fog function
products.fullDescription:
"Ripple" Series Irregular Backlit LED Bathroom Mirror - Product Introduction

This frameless organic-shaped mirror, inspired by natural water ripples, breaks the rigid lines of traditional bathroom spaces. It blends the relaxed vibe of wabi-sabi aesthetics with modern practical technology, becoming a standout decorative piece for any wall.

Design Aesthetics

Irregular Organic Silhouette: Soft curves mimicking pebbles or water waves soften the harshness of bathroom interiors, fitting seamlessly into minimalist, wabi-sabi, and luxury styles. It functions both as a mirror and a wall art piece.

Seamless Frameless Craftsmanship: Finely polished edges paired with a warm LED light strip create a dreamy halo effect when lit. Even when off, its smooth, flowing silhouette elevates the room’s overall texture.

Smart Lighting Experience

High-Definition Backlight: Surrounding soft light eliminates facial shadows caused by harsh overhead lighting, restoring true skin tones—ideal for makeup application, shaving, and detailed grooming.

Touch Control Panel: Dual touch buttons allow easy power control and adjustment of color temperature (3000K-6500K dimmable, optional) or brightness, switching between natural daylight and warm yellow light for different scenarios.

Optional Anti-Fog Function: The built-in heating module quickly clears steam, keeping the mirror fog-free after showers without wiping.

products.name: Backlit Smart Bathroom Mirror
products.shortDescription: An irregular-shaped frameless LED mirror with soft backlighting, blending modern style and warm ambient light
products.fullDescription:
"Pebble" Series Organic Backlit LED Mirror - Product Introduction

Inspired by naturally polished river stones, this asymmetrical LED mirror reimagines modern wall decor with soft, flowing lines that feel both timeless and utterly unique. Far from the rigidity of traditional square mirrors, its gentle, pebble-like silhouette brings a sense of organic calm to any space, from minimalist bathrooms to warm, earth-toned living rooms.

At its core, the mirror features a precision-engineered LED backlight system, casting a warm, diffused halo that wraps around its irregular edges. This ambient glow not only elevates the mirror into a statement wall art piece but also delivers functional, shadow-free illumination for grooming, makeup, or simply softening the mood of a room. The touch-sensitive control allows seamless adjustment of brightness (and optional color temperature), letting you tailor the light to match morning routines or evening relaxation.

Crafted with a premium 4mm copper-free silver mirror, it ensures crystal-clear, distortion-free reflections while resisting oxidation and moisture damage—perfect for humid bathroom environments. The added safety of an explosion-proof backing film and IP44-rated waterproof LED strip ensures long-lasting durability and peace of mind.

More than just a reflective surface, this mirror is a celebration of natural form and modern function. It turns everyday self-care rituals into moments of quiet luxury, while its sculptural shape adds an instant, sophisticated focal point to your walls.

products.name: Aluminium Framed LED Mirror
products.shortDescription: A sleek, teardrop-shaped smart bathroom mirror with ambient backlighting
products.fullDescription:
Teardrop-Shaped LED Bathroom Mirror with Backlit Glow

Elevate your bathroom with this uniquely designed smart LED mirror, crafted in a fluid teardrop silhouette that blends soft curves with modern minimalist style. Framed in a sleek matte black finish, the mirror’s asymmetric form breaks away from standard circular or rectangular designs, infusing your space with an artistic, contemporary charm that complements both neutral-toned and statement interiors.

The mirror features a premium copper-free silver glass surface, delivering crisp, distortion-free reflections ideal for grooming, makeup application, and daily routines. A subtle yet powerful backlight runs along the entire perimeter, casting a soft, diffused glow that doubles as ambient lighting and functional task light, creating a warm, spa-like atmosphere in any bathroom.

Built for wet environments, this mirror is fully waterproof and anti-fog, ensuring clear visibility even in steamy conditions. The intuitive touch control on the mirror’s surface allows you to easily toggle the light on/off and adjust brightness (or color temperature, depending on configuration) for customizable illumination.

A statement piece that balances form and function, this teardrop LED mirror adds both visual interest and practical value to bathrooms, powder rooms, or vanity spaces.

products.name: Bear-shaped LED Mirror
products.shortDescription: This is an adorable bear-shaped LED backlit bathroom mirror, featuring soft, playful organic edges and a glowing perimeter that casts a warm, cozy light, adding a touch of whimsy to any space.
products.fullDescription:
Bear-Shaped LED Backlit Bathroom Mirror

Infuse your space with whimsical charm and soft illumination with this adorable bear-shaped LED mirror, a perfect blend of playful design and modern functionality. Crafted with smooth, organic edges that trace the gentle silhouette of a bear’s head, this mirror breaks away from traditional geometric forms to bring warmth and personality to bathrooms, powder rooms, or cozy vanity nooks.

The mirror features a high-definition, distortion-free glass surface that delivers crisp reflections ideal for daily grooming, skincare routines, and makeup application. Running along the entire perimeter is a soft, diffused LED backlight, casting a warm, inviting glow that doubles as ambient lighting and functional task light—creating a cozy, spa-like atmosphere even in compact spaces.

Built for moisture-prone environments, this mirror is designed to be waterproof and fog-resistant, ensuring clear visibility even in steamy bathroom conditions. Its frameless, minimalist finish keeps the focus on the charming bear silhouette, while the easy-to-install wall-mounted design allows for seamless integration into any decor style, from soft Scandinavian to playful kid-friendly spaces.

A delightful statement piece that balances cute aesthetics with practical utility, this bear-shaped LED mirror turns a functional bathroom essential into a beloved focal point.

products.name: LED Full Length Mirror
products.shortDescription: This LED full-length mirror adds a sleek, on-trend touch to any modern space. A minimalist, fashion-forward mirror that elevates your room’s aesthetic instantly.
products.fullDescription:
Modern LED Full-Length Mirror – Style & Function in One

Elevate your space with this sleek, frameless full-length mirror, designed to bring contemporary style and practical lighting to any room. Its minimalist, rounded-edge silhouette delivers a clean, sophisticated look that complements modern, Scandinavian, and minimalist interiors alike.

The built-in dimmable LED light strip casts soft, even illumination around the mirror’s perimeter, creating a flattering, warm glow ideal for outfit checks, makeup application, or simply brightening up your space. Controlled by a convenient touch sensor, you can easily adjust the brightness to suit your mood or lighting needs. Crafted with high-quality glass, the mirror provides a crisp, distortion-free reflection, while its durable construction ensures long-lasting use. Whether mounted on the wall or standing in your bedroom, entryway, or dressing room, this LED mirror doubles as both a functional essential and a stylish statement piece, instantly adding a chic, modern touch to your home decor.

specs.value: PE bag + all around Polyfoam + Earth carton + Carton box , 1 pcs/ctn

products.name: Lighted Full Length Mirror
products.shortDescription: This smart LED full-length mirror features integrated touch controls and a digital display, blending modern lighting with functional tech for a smarter dressing experience.
products.fullDescription:
Your New Go-To Smart Mirror: Light, Style, and Convenience

Start every day right with our smart LED full-length mirror. The soft, adjustable LED lighting mimics natural light for flawless outfit checks and makeup application. The intuitive touch panel and digital display add practical perks like brightness control and time display, so you can prep quickly and easily. With its slim, modern design, it fits effortlessly into any room—turning your morning routine into a smoother, more stylish experience.

Adjustable LED Lighting: Soft, even glow for perfect styling, anytime.

Smart Touch Controls: Easily adjust brightness and access functions with a tap.

Digital Display: Check the time at a glance while getting ready.

Distortion-Free Reflection: Crystal-clear view for full-body outfit checks.

Sleek Modern Design: Fits seamlessly into any contemporary home decor.

specs.value: defogger(anti-fog), touch switch, time/temperature, Bluetooth (Music playing)

products.shortDescription: This minimalist smart LED full-length mirror features soft perimeter lighting and a built-in digital time display for a sleek, functional touch.
products.fullDescription:
Level up your daily routine

With touch controls and a built-in digital display, you can adjust brightness, check the time, and stay on track with ease. The built-in touch controls and digital display let you adjust brightness, check the time, and access smart features—all with a simple tap. Sleek, minimalist, and packed with tech, it turns your bedroom or dressing room into a modern, functional space.

Digital Display: Check the time at a glance while getting ready.

products.name: Acrylic Famed LED Mirror
products.shortDescription: The CTL503 is a modern, minimalist wall-mounted Round Smart LED Bathroom Mirror. Featuring a high-translucency frosted acrylic frame integrated with a concealed LED strip, it delivers a soft, elegant glow around the edges when turned on. With its seamless single-touch control and sleek profile, this mirror effortlessly enhances contemporary, Scandinavian, or luxury interior designs.
products.fullDescription:
• Premium Acrylic Glow Edge (Backlit & Side-lit)
    The outer frame is crafted from high-grade polymeric light-guiding acrylic. The LED light is filtered through the frosted acrylic, transforming harsh direct light into a soft, uniform, and glare-free ambiance. This design completely hides the internal light dots and prevents light leakage.

  • HD Copper-Free Mirror with Explosion-Proof Safety
    The mirror utilizes a 5mm high-definition, copper-free silver mirror that offers true-to-life reflection without distortion while ensuring superior anti-oxidation performance. The back is layered with an explosion-proof safety film, keeping shards held together tightly in case of accidental breakage to guarantee user safety.

  • Intuitive Single Touch Control
    A sleek, capacitive smart touch button is seamlessly integrated on the lower front mirror surface. The subtle built-in indicator light ensures effortless blind-touch operation even in dark or dim environments.

  • Moisture-Proof Structure for Wet Environments
    Engineered specifically for bathrooms, all core components—including the power driver, LED strip, and touch sensor—are fully enclosed and moisture-sealed. This prevents steam and water splash damage, ensuring a prolonged product lifespan.

specs.value: DIA 60 CM / DIA 70 CM / DIA 80 CM
5mm HD Copper-Free Silver Mirror (with explosion-proof backing film)
IP44 rating or above for internal electrical components

products.name: Oval Smart LED Bathroom Mirror
products.shortDescription: The CTL205 is an elegant, wall-mounted Oval Smart LED Bathroom Mirror featuring a stylish frosted inner border design. Combining functional illumination with sleek aesthetics, it comes equipped with integrated touch controls and a digital time display, making it a perfect fit for upscale modern bathrooms, dressing areas, and hospitality projects.
products.fullDescription:
• Elegant Frosted Inner Border Design
    The mirror features a precision-etched, frosted sandblasted track inside the glass edge. The built-in high-density LED strips shine through this frosted layer, creating a bright, uniform, and shadow-free front lighting effect that is perfect for makeup application and daily grooming.

  • Integrated Multi-Functional Smart Display
    Designed for premium user experience, the lower section of the mirror features a sleek capacitive touch sensor paired with a clear digital time display. This allows users to track the time while getting ready, preventing morning rush delays.

  • Copper-Free Mirror with Built-in Safety Film
    Crafted from a 5mm high-definition, copper-free silver mirror, it delivers exceptional reflection clarity without color distortion. The rear is sealed with an explosion-proof safety backing film, ensuring that the glass fragments remain bound together safely in the rare event of impact.

  • Flexible Sizing & Reliable Build
    Available in multiple standard oval dimensions and fully open to custom-made sizing to fit bespoke vanity counters. All electrical compartments are fully sealed against humidity and splashing, guaranteeing safe operation in wet bathroom conditions.

specs.value: 5mm HD Copper-Free Silver Mirror (with explosion-proof backing film)
Frosted sandblasted inner border track (Front-lit diffusion)

products.name: Oval Backlit LED Bathroom Mirror
products.shortDescription: The CTL206 is a premium, wall-mounted Oval Smart Backlit LED Bathroom Mirror featuring a sleek, frameless edge. By casting a seamless halo of light onto the wall, it creates a luxury floating optical effect. Equipped with integrated smart controls and a digital clock display, this model brings a sophisticated, ambient feel to modern bathrooms and high-end hospitality venues.
products.fullDescription:
• Atmospheric Backlit Glow (Floating Effect)
    Unlike front-lit mirrors, the CTL206 conceals its high-density LED light strip directly behind the glass edge, facing inward toward the wall. This produces a soft, indirect backlight halo that highlights the wall's texture, reduces harsh glare, and makes the mirror appear as if it is elegantly floating.

  • Sleek Multi-Function Smart Interface
    The lower middle surface of the mirror is equipped with a clean, high-sensitivity capacitive touch button and a crisp digital time display. This ensures users can stay on schedule during morning and evening grooming routines without needing an external clock.

  • Copper-Free Silver Glass with Shatterproof Protection
    Crafted from premium 5mm high-definition, copper-free silver glass, the mirror delivers crystal-clear reflection with exceptional resistance to black-edge oxidation. A heavy-duty explosion-proof safety film is applied to the back to keep the glass securely bound in place if accidentally impacted.

  • Flexible Sizing & Comprehensive Moisture-Proofing
    Offered in multiple standard elongated oval sizes as well as full custom-made dimensions to seamlessly fit bespoke vanity designs. All internal electronic modules, wiring, and LED components are fully moisture-sealed to withstand daily bathroom steam and humidity.

specs.value: 5mm HD Copper-Free Silver Mirror (with explosion-proof backing film)
Frameless backlit edge (Indirect halo diffusion / No front sandblasting)

products.name: Oval Framed LED Bathroom Mirror
products.shortDescription: The CTL0063B is a luxury, wall-mounted Oval Smart Backlit LED Bathroom Mirror wrapped in a sleek, ultra-thin matte black metal frame. By casting a soft halo of light onto the wall while maintaining a bold, structured silhouette, this mirror provides the perfect balance of modern industrial aesthetics and functional ambient lighting for premium residential and hospitality spaces.
products.fullDescription:
• Sophisticated Matte Black Metal Frame
    The mirror is encased in a premium-grade, lightweight aluminum alloy frame with an anodized matte black finish. This narrow-edge frame protects the glass corners, resists moisture and rust, and adds a strong, contemporary architectural line to any vanity space.

  • Atmospheric Backlit Glow (Floating Ambiance)
    Equipped with a hidden high-density LED strip, the CTL0063B-BLACK directs light backward against the wall. This produces an elegant, indirect halo effect that softly illuminates the washbasin area without causing direct glare to the eyes, making the mirror look beautifully detached from the wall.

  • Copper-Free Silver Glass with Shatterproof Protection
    Featuring a 5mm high-definition, copper-free silver mirror, it delivers crystal-clear reflection without any color distortion or dark-edge oxidation. A heavy-duty explosion-proof backing film is integrated into the back, preventing the glass fragments from splashing if accidentally broken.

  • Intelligent Touch Sensor & Moisture-Proof Engineering
    A minimalist, high-sensitivity capacitive touch button is embedded directly onto the lower mirror surface for effortless, click-free power control. All internal electrical components and wiring are fully sealed and moisture-proofed to guarantee safe, long-lasting use in humid bathroom environments.

specs.value: 5mm HD Copper-Free Silver Mirror (with explosion-proof backing film)
Metal frame border with integrated backlit indirect halo diffusion

products.name: Capsule-Shaped Smart Mirror
products.shortDescription: The CTL403 is a luxury, wall-mounted Capsule-Shaped Smart Backlit LED Bathroom Mirror (also known as stadium or racetrack shape). Featuring a sleek frameless edge that projects a soft, continuous halo of light onto the wall, this mirror blends a soft geometric silhouette with elegant ambient illumination, making it a perfect statement piece for double vanities, master bathrooms, and upscale hotel rooms.
products.fullDescription:
• Trendy Capsule Silhouette (Double-Vanity Ideal)
    Designed with a stylish, elongated capsule shape (straight sides with perfectly rounded semi-circular tops and bottoms). Its vertical proportions make it exceptionally suited for side-by-side dual installations over double-sink vanities, helping to visually elongate the bathroom ceiling height.

  • Atmospheric Backlit Glow (Floating Effect)
    The high-density LED light strip is seamlessly concealed behind the rim, directing its illumination backward toward the wall surface. This indirect lighting delivers a uniform glare-free glow, creating a beautiful floating visual depth and accentuating background tiling or wall textures.

  • HD Copper-Free Mirror with Explosion-Proof Safety
    The mirror is made from 5mm high-definition, copper-free silver glass that provides true-to-life reflections without color distortion. The glass is treated with a heavy-duty explosion-proof safety backing film, ensuring that fragments stay bound together safely in case of accidental impact.

  • Intelligent Touch Control & Moisture-Proof Build
    A subtle, highly responsive capacitive touch sensor switch is seamlessly embedded into the lower front surface for simple click-free control. All core electronic compartments, power supplies, and wiring are fully sealed and moisture-proofed to guarantee safe, long-lasting performance in humid bathroom environments.

specs.value: 50X80 CM / 50X100 CM / 60X100 CM / 60X120 CM / 70X130 CM / CUSTOM MADE
5mm HD Copper-Free Silver Mirror (with explosion-proof backing film)
Frameless capsule edge with integrated backlit indirect halo diffusion
Smart capacitive single touch sensor switch

products.name: Capsule-Shaped Frosted LED Mirror
products.shortDescription: The CTL407 is a sophisticated, wall-mounted Capsule-Shaped Smart Frosted LED Bathroom Mirror featuring an elegant sandblasted border. Combining structural geometry with integrated glowing front-lit illumination and smart touch controls, this mirror brings a bright, shadow-free clarity and contemporary architectural flair to modern bathrooms and premium dressing areas.
products.fullDescription:
• Sleek Capsule Silhouette with Frosted Border
    Designed in a trendy elongated capsule (racetrack) shape, this mirror features a precision-etched, frosted inner border tracking its unique outline. The high-density LED light shines directly through this frosted glass section, casting bright, face-level illumination that is ideal for daily grooming, makeup application, and shaving.

  • True-to-Life Reflection & Premium Glass
    Crafted from a 5mm high-definition, copper-free silver mirror, it provides exceptional reflection clarity without color distortion or dark-edge oxidation over time. The mirror back is reinforced with a heavy-duty explosion-proof safety film to keep the glass securely bound in place if accidentally impacted.

  • Intuitive Smart Touch Controls
    A subtle, highly responsive capacitive touch sensor switch is seamlessly embedded into the lower front surface for seamless, click-free operation. The light indicator ensures the switch remains effortlessly visible even in dark or dim environments.

  • Engineered for Wet Bathroom Environments
    Specially constructed for high-humidity areas, all internal electronic compartments, the power driver, and the LED modules are fully sealed and moisture-proofed. This prevents steam and water splash damage, ensuring reliable performance and a prolonged product lifespan.

specs.value: 50X80 CM / 50X100 CM / 60X100 CM / 60X120 CM / 70X130 CM / CUSTOM MADE
Frosted sandblasted inner border track (Front-lit diffusion / Anti-glare glow)
IP44 rating or above for internal electrical components

products.name: Oval LED Bathroom Mirror
products.shortDescription: A sleek, oval-shaped LED smart bathroom mirror with touch controls, designed for modern bathrooms, available in two standard sizes.
products.fullDescription: The CTL516P is a contemporary smart bathroom mirror that blends minimalist aesthetics with practical lighting functionality. Its elegant, rounded oval silhouette softens bathroom interiors while adding a modern touch. The mirror features a built-in LED light ring around the perimeter, offering bright, even illumination that can be easily toggled via touch controls on the mirror surface. The "light on" mode provides warm, clear lighting ideal for grooming and makeup application, while the "light off" mode showcases the mirror’s clean, frameless appearance. Designed to pair perfectly with matching bathroom vanities, this mirror is available in two versatile sizes to suit different bathroom layouts and space requirements.

The mirror includes a touch-sensitive power button for easy control of the light function, with clear visibility both in the “light off” (sleek black-framed mirror) and “light on” (soft halo glow) states. It is available in a wide range of standard sizes to fit different bathroom layouts, with custom sizing also offered for bespoke projects.

products.name: LED Smart Bathroom Mirror
products.shortDescription: This organic LED mirror brings warm ambient light and modern softness to the bathroom.
products.fullDescription:
Transform your bathroom into a serene, contemporary sanctuary with our Organic-Form LED Backlit Bathroom Mirror. Crafted with a fluid, irregular silhouette, this frameless mirror breaks away from traditional straight lines, bringing an artistic, sculptural presence to your vanity space. The soft, diffused halo of LED lighting wraps gently around its edges, casting a warm, even glow that flatters your features while eliminating harsh shadows—perfect for makeup application, skincare routines, or simply unwinding after a long day.

Built for both style and practicality, the adjustable LED lighting allows you to switch between different color temperatures to suit your mood: choose bright daylight tones for crisp clarity during your morning routine, or softer warm hues for a calming, spa-like ambiance in the evening. The mirror’s high-quality glass ensures a distortion-free reflection, while its sleek, minimalist design complements any modern, minimalist, or organic-inspired bathroom decor. More than just a functional essential, this mirror doubles as a striking wall piece that elevates the entire room, blending artistry, light, and everyday use into one unforgettable statement.

products.name: Arched Bathroom LED Mirror
products.shortDescription: Sleek arched LED bathroom mirror with full-edge lighting, touch controls, and customizable sizes, designed for modern hotels, apartments, and premium residential projects.
products.fullDescription:
The CTL803DW Arched LED Mirror combines contemporary arched styling with full perimeter LED lighting, creating a soft, uniform glow that eliminates shadows and enhances grooming visibility. Built for commercial and high-end residential use, this mirror features touch-sensitive controls for easy light adjustment (brightness/temperature optional), copper-free mirror glass for long-lasting clarity and corrosion resistance, and a durable, moisture-resistant frame.

Its elegant arched top adds a sophisticated architectural touch to bathrooms, powder rooms, and vanity areas, while the energy-efficient LED system ensures low power consumption and extended lifespan. The mirror is wall-mounted for easy installation, available in standard sizes and custom dimensions to meet project requirements, and finished with a smooth, easy-to-clean surface ideal for high-traffic environments like hotels, spas, and multi-family housing.

products.name: Frosted Arched LED Bathroom Mirror
products.shortDescription: Modern arched LED mirror with frosted light-diffusing edges, touch control, and customizable sizes, perfect for premium hotel and residential bathroom projects.
products.fullDescription:
The CTL803D Frosted Edge Arched LED Mirror features a sleek, arched silhouette with full perimeter frosted LED lighting that creates a soft, even glow, eliminating harsh shadows and delivering optimal light for grooming and makeup. The frosted edge diffuses light to reduce glare, while the copper-free mirror glass ensures crystal-clear, distortion-free reflections and long-term resistance to moisture and corrosion.

Designed for commercial-grade durability, this mirror includes a touch-sensitive control (visible in the image) for easy on/off operation, with optional brightness and color temperature adjustments available. Its minimalist, contemporary design complements both modern and transitional bathroom styles, making it ideal for hotels, apartments, spas, and luxury residential projects. Wall-mounted for straightforward installation, it is offered in standard sizes and supports full customization to meet specific project requirements.

specs.value: Full perimeter edge-lit with frosted diffuser, soft glare-free glow
Residential bathrooms, hotels, apartments, spas, commercial renovation projects

Built with high-quality copper-free mirror glass, the mirror ensures clear, distortion-free reflections and long-term resistance to moisture and corrosion.
